memoryArtifacts.headline: Gilbert de Aquila
memoryArtifacts.description:
Gilbert de Aquila, the son and heir of Richer de L'Aigle. Lord of L'Aigle and 1st Baron of Pevensey in Sussex.

Gilbert known as Aquila brought the greatest wealth and power to the Anglo-Norman dynast …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Gilbert de  L'Aigle於大約1070年出生在法國諾門迪奧內利艾格爾時，他的父親Sir Richer de L'Aigle32歲，母親Judith d'Avranches21歲。他於1091年與Juliana du Perche結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1120年11月25日在法國諾門迪曼其享年51歲。

nameMeanings.name: Gilbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from gisil ‘pledge’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. This was the name of the founder of the only native British religious order (abolished at the Dissolution of the Monasteries), St Gilbert of Sempringham ( ?1083–1189 ), in whose honour it is still sometimes bestowed, especially among Roman Catholics. It gained a wider currency in the 19th century.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

nameMeanings.name: L'Aigle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Gotthilf.
German: variant of Faigl, a southern short form of Veilchen, the name of the flower violet.

en.lifeSummary: When Gilbert de  L'Aigle was born about 1070, in L'Aigle, Orne, Normandy, France, his father, Sir Richer de L'Aigle, was 32 and his mother, Judith d'Avranches, was 21. He married Juliana du Perche in 1091. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 25 November 1120, in Manche, Normandy, France, at the age of 51.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gilbert de  L'Aigle est né environ 1070, à L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, France, son père, Sir Richer de L'Aigle, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Judith d'Avranches, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Juliana du Perche en 1091. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 25 novembre 1120, à Manche, Normandie, France, à l’âge de 51 ans.

Er hat 1091 Juliana du Perche geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 25. November 1120 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Manche, Normandie, Frankreich.

ko.lifeSummary: Gilbert de  L'Aigle(이)가 대략 1070년 프랑스 노먼디 른 '아익일에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Richer de L'Aigle(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Judith d'Avranches(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1091년 Juliana du Perche(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1120년 11월 25일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체에서 51세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gilbert de  L'Aigle nasceu aproximadamente 1070, em L'Aigle, Orne, Normandie, França, seu pai, Sir Richer de L'Aigle, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Judith d'Avranches, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Juliana du Perche em 1091. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 25 de novembro de 1120, em Manche, Normandie, França, com 51 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gilbert de  L'Aigle родился около 1070 г. в местности л'еигл, орн, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Sir Richer de L'Aigle было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Judith d'Avranches, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Juliana du Perche в 1091 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 25 ноября 1120 г. в местности манч, норманди, Франция в возрасте 51 год.
